videos.title: Server-Sent Events Tutorial - Real-Time Web Communication
videos.description: A comprehensive tutorial on Server-Sent Events covering the EventSource API, event stream format, and building a real-time notification system.

videos.title: SSE vs WebSockets vs Long Polling - Which Should You Use?
videos.description: Comparison of real-time communication technologies explaining when to use SSE, WebSockets, or traditional long-polling with practical examples.

videos.title: Server-Sent Events Crash Course
videos.description: Build a complete real-time application using Server-Sent Events, covering server-side implementation in Node.js and client-side EventSource API.

videos.title: EventSource API and Server-Sent Events Explained
videos.description: Deep dive into the EventSource API, event stream protocol, custom event types, and reconnection behavior with practical demos.

videos.title: Real-Time Notifications with Server-Sent Events
videos.description: Learn how to build a real-time notification system using SSE, including multi-channel events, event filtering, and browser compatibility.
